title: SDVM Action Preview — Friendly Sample Report
subtitle: Synthetic illustration of public-safe workflow evidence screening
preview_notice: This sample is synthetic and presentation-oriented. It does not represent full SDVM pilot-grade analysis and does not include scoring internals, statistical methodology, thresholds, weights, calibration, or playbook logic.

screening_summary.screening_status_label: Partial but usable for pilot discussion

what_this_suggests: Evidence structure is recognizable and repeatable across runs.
PRE/POST comparison may become stronger after capture refinement.
Workflow may be a candidate for controlled pilot screening — not for autonomous remediation.
what_remains_unknown: Workflow coordination degradation patterns (requires full SDVM analysis).
Causal root cause or intervention effectiveness.
Any scored diagnostic or playbook output.
